description: Ordering campaign: semantics of the private `_private_experimental_ reorder to dos in` command across scopes (Today partial lists, evening-bucket interaction, projects, areas, heading-contained children) plus regression locks for the URL bounce primitive (Today + Evening). Feeds write.reorder (experimental native strategy + verified bounce fallback).

probes.title: private reorder with a PARTIAL ids list in Today: listed items adopt the given order; what happens to unlisted members is the finding

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-A'
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-B'
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-C'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in list "Today" with ids "{uuid:O-C},{uuid:O-B},{uuid:O-A}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-C') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-B')
SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-B') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-A')

probes.title: DESTRUCTIVE FINDING: including an Evening member in a Today reorder CLEARS its startBucket (silently de-evenings it) — native reorder normalizes bucket to the targeted list; evening scope is bounce-only and the today-scope guard must reject bucket-1 members

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-E' AND startBucket=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-F'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in list "Today" with ids "{uuid:O-E},{uuid:O-F}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-E') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-F')

probes.title: private reorder against a PROJECT specifier — native project-child reordering?

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in project "LAB-PROJ-PLAIN" with ids "{seed:LAB-P-3},{seed:LAB-P-1}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-P-3}') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-P-1}')

probes.title: private reorder against an AREA specifier (direct area to-dos)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AA1' AND area='{seed:LAB-AREA-A}'
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AA2' AND area='{seed:LAB-AREA-A}'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in area "LAB-AREA-A" with ids "{uuid:O-AA2},{uuid:O-AA1}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AA2') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AA1')

probes.title: DESTRUCTIVE FINDING: project-scope reorder RIPS heading-contained children out of their heading (heading -> NULL) — guards must reject headed uuids; heading-scoped ordering remains unautomatable

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in project "LAB-PROJ-HEADINGS" with ids "{seed:LAB-H-A2},{seed:LAB-H-A1}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-H-A2}') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-H-A1}')

probes.title: bounce primitive, Today: evening->today round-trip front-inserts; neighbors untouched (regression lock for the fallback strategy)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN1'
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN2'
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN3'

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN3' AND startBucket=1
SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN3' AND startBucket=0

SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN3') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN1') AND (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN3') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BN2')

probes.title: bounce primitive, Evening: today->evening round-trip front-inserts within the evening section

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE1' AND startBucket=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE2' AND startBucket=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE3' AND startBucket=1

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE3' AND startBucket=0
SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE3' AND startBucket=1

SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE3') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE1') AND (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE3') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-BE2')

probes.title: private reorder with a PROJECT ID specifier (production form: uuid addressing avoids title-collision ambiguity; O04 only proved the name form)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in project id "{seed:LAB-PROJ-PLAIN}" with ids "{seed:LAB-P-1},{seed:LAB-P-3}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-P-1}') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-P-3}')

probes.title: private reorder with an AREA ID specifier (production form: uuid addressing; O05 only proved the name form)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in area id "{seed:LAB-AREA-A}" with ids "{uuid:O-AA1},{uuid:O-AA2}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AA1') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AA2')

probes.title: production wire-list shape in a MIXED project: full un-headed-children ids list (headings + headed children excluded) — heading rows and headed children must be untouched. Depends on post-O06 state (LAB-H-A1/A2 are un-headed by now).

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in project id "{seed:LAB-PROJ-HEADINGS}" with ids "{seed:LAB-H-A2},{seed:LAB-H-FLAT},{seed:LAB-H-A1}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-H-A2}') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-H-FLAT}') AND (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-H-FLAT}') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='{seed:LAB-H-A1}')

probes.title: PROJECT rows in Today: the ids list accepts a project uuid (project inherits from `to do` in the sdef) — required so the today-scope wire list can pin scheduled projects instead of leaving their placement underdetermined

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-PROJ-TODAY' AND type=1

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in list "Today" with ids "{uuid:O-PROJ-TODAY},{uuid:O-A}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-PROJ-TODAY') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-A')

probes.title: SIDEBAR area ordering is IMPOSSIBLE via AppleScript move ('Can't make before area id ... into type location specifier'); no other surface known. Regression lock.

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move area id "{seed:LAB-AREA-B}" to before area id "{seed:LAB-AREA-A}"

probes.title: PROJECTS within an area: private reorder with PROJECT uuids in an area specifier (projects inherit `to do`, O12 analog)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AP1' AND type=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AP2' AND type=1

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in area id "{seed:LAB-AREA-B}" with ids "{uuid:O-AP2},{uuid:O-AP1}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AP2') < (SELECT "index" FROM TMTask WHERE title='O-AP1')
